titleStmt.title: SII 8.439: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 439. (A.R. No. 151 of 1903). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME STEPS.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti . śrīmanma hāmaṇṭalīcuraṉ Ariyarāyavipāṭan metiṉimicarakaṇṭa kaṭṭāri
cāḷuva Immaṭinaraciṅkarāya taṉmarāyar piṟutuvirācciyam paṇṇiaruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam
1000 4 100 2 10 2- ṉmel cellāniṉṟa Iravuttirasaṁsa ṟsa rattu dakṣi ṇāyanattu dha nurmāsattu pavurṇa
yum bṛhaspati vāramum peṟṟa kāttikai nāḷ comakkirāṇa puṇṇiyakālattu Ayyaṉ
tipparacaayyaṉ taṉmamāka Eppulināyakkar vaiytta virupparāyakiriyāṉa yirāyampalappaṟṟil
pūlāṅkuḷamāṉa tipparacapuram comakkirāṇapuṇya kālattu Eppulināyakkar cakiraṇya Udakadhārā pūṟu
va dharmmadā ṉamāka koṭutta kiḻmaṅkalanāṭṭu cuntarapāṇṭiyaccaturvveti maṅkalattu
kāttiyāyaṉagotra ttu Āculāyaṉasūtra ttu peruṅka nallūr Aruḷuṭaip
perumāḷ peraruḷāḷappaṭṭaṉukku pākamāka Ivaṉuṭaiya taṉuṭṭā tārā
paṭṭaṉukku pākam I tāḻaiyūrnāṭṭu veppaṅkuḷamāṉa māḷuvatuṅkacaturve ti
maṅkalattu māṭalakottiṟattu Āculāyaṉasū ttiṟattu kūmur Eṭuttakaiaḻakiyār cavarirāca
paṭṭaṉukku pākamāka Ivar puttiṟaṉ tirumāliruñcolaipaṭṭaṉukku pākam I Āka pā
kam k koṭutta pūlāṅkuḷamāṉa tipparacapurattukku Ellai pūvaṉ ciṟumpi
kuḷattu laikku meṟku teṉpāṟkellai tiruccūlakkallukku vaṭakku melpāṟ
kkellai cūriyaṉvayalukku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai maṭṭiyūrkuḷattukku vel
varukiṟa kālukku teṟkum Icainta perunāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭ
ṭa nañcai puñcai kuḷam kuḷapparappu nattam nattapparappu kiḷṇokkiya kiṇaṟu
melnokkiya maramum niti nikṣepa pāṣāṇa maṟṟumuḷḷa samatta piṟāttikaḷum canta
tipiṟavecame cantirātittiyavaṟ cella tāṉātamaṉa vinimaya vikkiṟaiyaṅkaḷum yokki
yamāka koḷḷavum Itukku patinta kuṭi caṟuvamāniyamāka Aṉupavittukkoḷḷavum .
Intat taṉamattukku A[hita]m ceytavaṉ keṅkaikkaraiyile kuruvum mātāpitāvaiyum vatai
ceytavāḷ pāpattile pokakkaṭavarākavum . dā napālaṉaiyomattiye dā ṉāceyonu pāla
nam dānāt sva ṟkamā ppunoti pālanātaccutampadam . stada ttātuvikuṇam puṇya m parada ttā
nu pālanam parada ttāpahāreṇa stada ttanniṣvalam bhavet .
Digital edition of SII 8.439 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
